headline: Abbott: Three Supercycles, Mispriced At A 10-Year Low

headline: A Look At Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Valuation After Mixed Q1 Results And Baby Formula Legal Ruling
summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) is back in focus after mixed first quarter results, a cut to its 2026 adjusted EPS outlook tied to the Exact Sciences acquisition, and a large baby formula legal verdict that raised fresh questions. See our latest analysis for Abbott Laboratories. The recent mix of weaker first quarter sentiment, the Exact Sciences related EPS guidance cut and the baby formula verdict has coincided with a sharp reset in expectations. The share price is down 15.9% over 30 days and...
